title: Statement on Significant  benchmarks notified under Article 24(2) of the Benchmark Regulation - Nasdaq
text:
13 March 2026
ESMA81-1841807023-1051
Public Statement
Significant benchmarks notified under Article 24(2) of the
Benchmark Regulation
ESMA has received a notification from the administrator Nasdaq Inc. pursuant to Article 24(2)
of the Benchmark Regulation (BMR)1 stating that the below benchmark has reached the
threshold of EUR 50 billion referred to in Article 24(1) of the BMR.
Following receipt of the notification, ESMA is publishing this statement in accordance
with Article 24(2) of the BMR to specify that the following benchmark is significant
according to Article 24(1), point (a), of the BMR:
Benchmark Administrator Administrator Relevant Date of the Applied EU/EEA
Full name Full name Country authority notification Status
under Article
24(2) BMR
Nasdaq 100 Nasdaq, Inc. United States ESMA 5 March 2026 Application for
Index®* recognition
under Article 32
* For a complete list of the related benchmarks that are used in the Union and fall in-scope of Article 24(1), market
participants should refer to the ESMA Register
Next steps:
The administrator Nasdaq Inc. located in the United States has 60 working days from 5 March
2026 to seek either recognition or endorsement with ESMA. Further, ESMA will update the
ESMA register 2 to include the different relevant characteristics of this benchmark as
significant pursuant to Article 24(2) of the BMR.
1 Regulation (EU) 2016/1011 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 8 June 2016 on indices used as benchmarks in
financial instruments and financial contracts or to measure the performance of investment funds and amending Directives
2008/48/EC and 2014/17/EU and Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 (OJ L 171, 29.6.2016, p. 1, ELI: http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg/
2016/1011/oj).
2 Additional_Benchmarks_Data.xlsx
ESMA - 201-203 rue de Bercy - CS 80910 - 75589 Paris Cedex 12 - France - www.esma.europa.eu 1
